title: Instant Air Replenish
description: Adds gamerule to restore pre-1.13 oxygen regen.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/1WhuY6q.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/VniXNq0.png)

As of Minecraft version 1.13 and beyond, player oxygen regenerates over time out of water as opposed to happening instantaneously.

This mod restores that pre-1.13 functionality with a gamerule 'toggleOldAirReplenish'. It's set to true by default, and you can use the following command as an op to change it:

`/gamerule toggleOldAirReplenish true/false`
